executor_evidence: T04 added Phase 3-1 coordination contract content to five existing skill markdown files and fixed contract test compatibility. plan/SKILL.md: Hyperplan-Lite Challenge Checklist section + canonical Phase 3-1 Coordination Reference section with exact ownership mode/operation invariants. execute/SKILL.md: canonical Phase 3-1 Execution Ownership Reference section. pre-execute-alignment/SKILL.md: Phase 3-1 Ownership and Conflict-Sensitive Batching section + Mailbox Handoff Expectations subsection using canonical message_type executor_handoff for plan-to-execute handoff summaries. final-review/SKILL.md: Phase 3-1 Final-Review Coordination Checks section + Ownership Failure Rules subsection. spec/SKILL.md: Phase 3-1 Security Trigger Identification section + Phase 3-2 deferred scope. phase2-artifact-state-contract.test.ts: Added stripPhase31Sections helper to allow authorized Phase 3-1 sections without triggering Phase 2 scope exclusion checks. phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts: Added targeted assertion requiring executor_handoff and rejecting plan_to_execute_handoff in pre-execute-alignment mailbox wording. All 109 Phase 3 contract tests pass, all 136 Phase 2 contract tests pass, all 207 helper tests pass, typecheck passes.

diagnostics_status.summary: LSP server not available for .md files. Skill doc changes are markdown-only with no TypeScript source modifications. tsc --noEmit serves as the static analysis gate and passed clean.
